description: The 'Ndrina Barreca is a 'ndrina (criminal family) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, based in the southern area of Reggio Calabria, active since the 1980s. It operates in the neighborhoods of Pellaro, Bocale, and Lazzaro. Originally part of the Ambrogio clan, it split off during the Pellaro feud in the late 1980s. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and violent feuds, and several members have become pentiti (collaborators with justice).
